text:
The first scene places me at the entrance to a busy room, perhaps a lecture, seminar, or gallery event. There’s a subdued, anticipatory energy among people gathering and sitting. I feel curious, slightly detached, as if on the threshold between worlds—inside and out, participant and observer.

The second scene shifts me into a vibrant, immersive exhibition space. Bright, playful design and bold text catch my eye. I reflect on creativity, collaboration, and the merging of research with public engagement. Here, I feel inspired and open, caught in a moment of thoughtful wonder at human ingenuity—drawn into the weave of ideas and connections before me.
